div.h1: vEB Layout: Logical to Physical Index Mapping

div.p: Bottom Subtrees (4 trees, each 3 nodes): Subtree 0 (rooted at BFS 3):
After vEB index 3, the next indices are 7, 8, 9 (not 4, 5, 6). This gap occurs because:

ol.li: First bottom subtree root (BFS 3) uses vEB 3
First bottom subtree children (BFS 7, 8) use vEB 7, 8 vEB 4, 5, 6 are reserved for other bottom subtree roots (BFS 4, 5, 6). This ensures each subtree's nodes are contiguous in memory.
